title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zomato - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zomato - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zomato family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
